mnemonics: WEB CRAWL: Web Retrieval Employs Bots Crawling Randomly Across Websites Locating Links
keyPoints: Web retrieval involves indexing vast amounts of unstructured web data
Search engines use crawlers to discover and download web pages
Ranking algorithms determine the order of search results
commonMistakes: Assuming search results are ranked purely by relevance rather than a combination of relevance and authority
Forgetting that web crawlers cannot index all content (e.g., deep web content)
Overlooking the importance of link analysis (e.g., PageRank) in determining page importance
